payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Partial crop showing the front/foot of a bed with a white-and-gray vertically striped quilt or comforter draped over the mattress, hanging over a dark brown wooden footboard; left side is edge-cropped and the camera is approximately 1.0 m from the bed.
